title: tragacantha australis
intro: Tragacantha australis, also known as the Australian milk thistle or Tragacanth, is a type of plant with a milky sap and a spiny stem. The plant's sap contains mucilage, a thick and protective substance with medicinal properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Tragacantha australis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the treatment of liver and gallbladder problems. Herbal preparations of Tragacantha australis can be made into capsules, teas, or topical creams, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
